ocr_findings.description: The pyramid diagram at the bottom of the page contains three labeled tiers: '経営理念' (top), 'ビジョン' (middle), '経営戦略' (bottom), plus a callout '別名ストラテジ。試験3大分野の1つ'. None of these diagram-internal labels are captured in the OCR — the diagram is replaced by '![img-0.jpeg](img-0.jpeg)' with only the caption '● 経営理念はすべての企業活動の指針である'. The missing labels carry meaningful exam content (hierarchy of 経営理念→ビジョン→経営戦略).

reviewer_notes: Content page covering 株式会社の3登場人物 (経営者/社員/株主) and 経営理念 as '会社の存在意義'. All prose text captured correctly including bold/colored terms and page cross-references (p.15, p.217). The pyramid diagram labels are missing from OCR — medium severity since they convey the 経営理念/ビジョン/経営戦略 hierarchy which is key exam content. Page number '14' captured.
